text:
NAME: CHIP_CVRG_CHLDRN_POP_IND 

LONG NAME: CHIP_CVRG_CHLDRN_POP_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APL base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: This data element is triggered by a value of 61 (Targeted Low-Income Children), 62 (Deemed 
Newborn) or 63 (Children Ineligible for Medicaid Due to Loss of Income Disregards) in any instance of 
MC_PLAN_ELGBLTY_GRP_POP_CD. 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
